name: Keycloak Terraform/OpenTofu provisioning baseline

clients.name: Platform SPA
clients.note: Provisioned for future direct-SPA flows. Not used by current ADR-ACT-0008 fixture-session slice.

clients.name: Platform BFF/API
clients.note: Handles full OAuth callback flow per ADR-0022.

roles.name: system-admin
roles.semantics: Full access across all tenants. Not assignable via product UI.

fixtureUsers.policy: local/dev only; gated by provision_fixture_users = true; never for staging/production

validationResults.terraformInit: mrparkers/keycloak v4.4.0 installed, lock file generated
validationResults.terraformPlan: Plan: 15 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.
validationResults.planNote: Plan run on port 8090 (port 8080 occupied in test environment). Standard local port is 8080.

Keycloak running at http://localhost:8080 (docker compose --profile identity up -d keycloak)
